creator: stream@streambag.se
text:
The nvidia driver will not compile on -CURRENT after Fri Feb 23 12:19:07 2007 UTC,  due to changes to /sys/sys/bus.h. See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/sys/bus.h for more information.

How-To-Repeat: On a recent -CURRENT do:
cd /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver && make
